name: playwright-javascript
description: Production-ready E2E test automation framework built with Playwright and JavaScript. Features Page Object Model, Allure reporting, SauceLabs cloud integration, and CI/CD optimization.

scripts.ci:verify: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run test:ci
scripts.single-test-file: npm run clean && playwright test e2e-tests/cart.spec.js --reporter=line
scripts.test-list-reporter: npm run clean && playwright test e2e-tests/cart.spec.js --reporter=list
scripts.test-line-reporter: npm run clean && playwright test e2e-tests/cart.spec.js --reporter=line
scripts.test-dot-reporter: npm run clean && playwright test e2e-tests/cart.spec.js --reporter=dot
scripts.test-html-reporter: npm run clean && playwright test e2e-tests/cart.spec.js --reporter=html
scripts.test-json-reporter: npm run clean && playwright test e2e-tests/cart.spec.js --reporter=json
scripts.test-junit-reporter: npm run clean && playwright test e2e-tests/cart.spec.js --reporter=junit
scripts.e2e: npm run clean && playwright test -c e2e.config.js
scripts.e2e:dev: dotenv -e .env.dev -- npm run clean && dotenv -e .env.dev -- playwright test -c e2e.config.js
scripts.e2e:qa: dotenv -e .env.qa -- npm run clean && dotenv -e .env.qa -- playwright test -c e2e.config.js
scripts.e2e:uat: dotenv -e .env.uat -- npm run clean && dotenv -e .env.uat -- playwright test -c e2e.config.js
scripts.e2e-commandline-reporter: npm run clean && playwright test -c e2e.config.js --reporter=line,./my-awesome-reporter.js,allure-playwright

author: Code with MMAK
